# coreweave_inference_gateway_parameters (Data Source)

Retrieve available gateway parameters for CoreWeave Managed Inference.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coreweave_inference_gateway_parameters" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `zones` (List of String) Available zones for inference gateways.
